inputs.description: Create scripts/enrichment/batch_wikipedia.py — CLI script with --pass and --limit flags. Implement run_pass_1(): query authority_enrichment for all wikidata_ids, resolve QIDs to Wikipedia titles via resolve_titles_batch, fetch links+categories via fetch_links_batch, cache all in wikipedia_cache table. Test with --limit 5 first, then run full Pass 1 (all agents). Report stats. Commit.
inputs.testCommand: cd /home/hagaybar/projects/rare-books-bot && poetry run python -m scripts.enrichment.batch_wikipedia --pass 1 --db data/index/bibliographic.db --limit 5 2>&1 | tail -10
